category_sources: Official SourceForge project page categorizes gtmess under Chat and Messaging.
source_facts.description says it is a console MSN messenger client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and SourceForge project page use gtmess.
docs_sources: Official homepage states documentation is included in the distribution and provides online README, INSTALL, manpage, and FAQ links.
source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage and includes features, downloads, and documentation links.
repo_sources: Official gtmess homepage says source code with history was uploaded to GitHub and lists github.com/geotz/gtmess as the source repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists console interface, MSNP12 protocol, Unicode, pthreads, and notification features.
source_facts.description supports MSN Messenger and console-client tags.
